general_textarena_slm_policy.name: general_textarena_slm_policy
general_textarena_slm_policy.value: Follow the visible TextArena rules. Track state across observations, avoid repeating invalid actions, and output only one legal action.

hangman_slm_policy.name: hangman_slm_policy
hangman_slm_policy.value:
For Hangman-v0: Guess common letters first. Return one bracketed letter unless you know the full word.

Learned rules:
- Track the latest observation, obey the exact action format, avoid repeated invalid/no-progress actions, and use this environment hint: Guess common letters first. Return one bracketed letter unless you know the full word.
